overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City. The player transitions from a covered pedestrian walkway beneath an elevated structure, across an open plaza, down stairs to street level, and through a busy downtown intersection surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway with teal industrial walls and overhead fluorescent lighting

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and shorts walking toward camera while looking at a handheld device
person sitting on concrete bench against the wall

entered.detail: concrete corridor beneath elevated structure with teal painted walls
simple concrete seating along the walkway walls
smooth teal painted concrete walls with industrial aesthetic
long fluorescent light strips mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a covered pedestrian walkway with teal industrial walls and concrete flooring. Sparse pedestrians are present, including one person walking toward the camera and others sitting on benches. The space is artificially lit with overhead fluorescent strips, and the end of the corridor shows daylight and city buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated open plaza with panoramic city skyline views

events.description: exits the covered walkway into bright sunlight and open plaza with views of downtown skyscrapers
turns right while walking across the plaza toward the stairway

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered area into sunlight and turning right across the open plaza

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench facing the city skyline

entered.detail: cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers visible in the distance
large circular industrial fan mounted on the building facade
descending stairs with orange railings leading down to street level
tropical palm trees visible at the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway into a sunlit elevated plaza with panoramic views of Night City's skyline. The player turns right across the concrete plaza, passing benches and approaching a stairwell. The industrial ventilation fan on the adjacent building becomes prominent as the camera moves toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway descending from elevated plaza to street level

events.description: begins descending the concrete stairs with orange railings
reaches the bottom of the stairs and steps onto the street-level sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs with orange safety railings toward the busy street below

notable_agents.action: shirtless man walking up the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: bright orange metal handrails lining both sides of the stairway
view of the street below with vehicles and pedestrians becoming visible
orange and white barriers separating pedestrian and vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: The player descends a concrete stairwell with bright orange railings, transitioning from the elevated plaza down to street level. A shirtless pedestrian passes going up the stairs. The view opens up to show the street below with the Broseph Brewing billboard visible on a building across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with commercial storefronts and traffic

events.description: futuristic black vehicles drive past on the street to the left
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers and neon signs overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk next to traffic, passing pedestrians and looking up at the massive buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving down the multi-lane street
pedestrian in gray jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large blue digital billboard advertising Broseph Brewing Company with white text
tall building with vertical 'SABURO' signage in green and red
elevated walkway or transit line crossing between buildings overhead
multiple large digital advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: Now at street level, the player walks along a busy downtown sidewalk with moderate pedestrian traffic and vehicles passing by. The Broseph Brewing billboard is prominent on the left, while the massive Saburo corporate tower rises on the right. The camera tilts up to reveal the scale of the surrounding skyscrapers and elevated transit bridges.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers

events.description: tilts camera upward to view the full height of the surrounding towers against the sky
crosses the street at the intersection alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while looking up at the massive skyscrapers and neon advertisements overhead

notable_agents.action: woman in red pants and blue top crossing the street

entered.detail: immense futuristic towers with glass facades rising high above the street
dense collection of bright neon signs and digital advertisements on building faces
marked crosswalk at busy intersection with traffic lights and barriers

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a major intersection surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive digital billboards and neon signs. The camera pans up to emphasize the vertical scale of the buildings. Other pedestrians cross alongside, and the Saburo tower shifts from right to left as the player moves through the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with commercial storefronts and vending machines

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various shops and street elements, moving away from the main intersection

entered.detail: ground-level commercial shops with illuminated windows and signage
futuristic vending machines with glowing displays on the sidewalk
public seating along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along a less crowded sidewalk past storefronts and vending machines. The massive towers of the intersection recede behind as the player moves into a slightly narrower street section. The elevated transit bridge remains visible ahead, and the street continues with parked vehicles and commercial buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined industrial corridor into the sprawling, vertical scale of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway defined by teal walls and fluorescent lighting, moving past sparse pedestrians toward a bright opening at the end of the hall. As the camera exits the corridor, the space expands into a sunlit elevated plaza where the view opens up to the city skyline before turning toward a concrete stairwell. The scene then shifts downward as the camera descends stairs with bright orange railings, transitioning from the quiet heights of the plaza to the bustling energy of the street level. Finally, the movement continues along a crowded downtown sidewalk, passing a prominent Broseph Brewing billboard while tilting upward to reveal the massive Saburo corporate tower and elevated transit bridges towering overhead.

The shot follows a continuous movement from the overwhelming verticality of a neon-drenched intersection into the more intimate scale of a commercial side street. It begins by crossing a major junction where the camera pans upward to capture towering skyscrapers draped in massive digital billboards and glowing signs. As the player moves forward, the Saburo tower shifts from right to left in the frame while pedestrians navigate the crossing together. The scene then transitions away from the dense center, causing the massive towers to recede as the camera follows a less crowded sidewalk lined with storefronts and vending machines. Finally, the perspective settles into a narrower street section with parked vehicles, keeping the elevated transit bridge visible in the distance.
